title: Why Is The Computer So Slow?
ticket: A training machine is very slow during normal work.
clue: Check CPU and memory before guessing.
tooltip: Task Manager shows what uses the most resources.
whyItMatters: Slow systems hurt productivity and frustrate users.
careerConnection: Performance triage is a common help desk task.

actionTask.instructions: Sort Task Manager by CPU usage and identify the heaviest process.
actionTask.expectedResult: You can name the top process and explain the impact.
actionTask.screenshotExample: Task Manager process list sorted by CPU.

repeatTask: Repeat the diagnosis while another heavy app is open.
breakFixTask: End the wrong safe process, then relaunch and recover.
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without help?
ticketCompletion: System performance is improved and documented.

translationTerms.why: It can reveal what is slowing the PC.

translationTerms.plain: The part of the computer that does work.
translationTerms.why: High CPU can make everything slow.
